revenge.description: If anyone attacks the ogre by surprise, be it a sneak attack or an ally that missed their target, the ogre's rage activates and he must attack them back at least once. (once a real game, everyone except the responsible becomes invisible and the ogre involuntarily moves towards them)

small.description: Gremlins can't use great weapons. Versatile weapons are two-handed to them.

unurban.description: Can't find their way in a town, even with a map. (in-game map absent)

imposed_element_earth.description: All trolls are earthbenders by default, in addition to another element.

big_bellied.description: Everything in a troll's anatomy makes them heavier. [b]+{weight_mod}[/b] Weight Value.

imposed_element_air.description: All jinn are airbenders by default, in addition to another element.

imposed_element_fire.description: All tieflings are firebenders by default, in addition to another element.

short_breath.description: A tiefling's burning metabolism needs lots of air. Disadvantage on suffocation resistance rolls.

bland_face.description: Doppler faces resemble each other too much. They can be neither ugly nor pretty, with even long-time friends and family members finding it hard to recognize their true face.

squishy.description: Fairies have similar HP levels to a potato chip, suffering [b]-5 HP per level[/b].

very_small.description: One handed weapons are great weapons to fairies. Anything else is similar to wielding a tree.

overpriced.description: Can't loot non-giant armor. Armor prices are tripled.

clumsy.description: A giant's massive frame is a big target that takes long to accelerate, rendering them completely unable to dodge. Disadvantage to stealth and acrobatics rolls.

flabby.description: Max carry weight and hand to hand damage are halved because of the soft body of a geleton.
